inputs.label: Design Pressure

inputs.label: Allowable Stress
inputs.businessContext: Allowable stress of the pipe material at design temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Allowable stress of the pipe material at design temperature.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Boyuna birleştirme verim faktörü (0 ile 1 arasında).

businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de eficiencia de junta longitudinal (entre 0 y 1).

inputs.label: Corrosion Allowance
inputs.businessContext: Additional thickness to compensate for corrosion or erosion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional thickness to compensate for corrosion or erosion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Korozyon veya erozyonu telafi etmek için ek kalınlık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Dicke zum Ausgleich von Korrosion oder Erosion
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur supplémentaire pour compenser la corrosion ou l'érosion.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor adicional para compensar corrosión o erosión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سمك إضافي لتعويض التآكل أو التآكل

breakdown: Final thickness includes corrosion allowance: t = P*D/(2*S*E) + C
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
